name: Dutch Rhubarb Pie
recipeInstructions:
1 Wash and trim rhubarb and cut into 1/2 inch slices to make about 3 1/2 cups. Place in unbaked pie shell.
2 In a small mixing bowl, mix together the sugar, flour, salt, and spices.
3 Blend in evaporated milk to the melted butter.
4 Add the mixture of sugar, flour, salt, spices, and melted butter to the rhubarb.
5 Pour all over the rhubarb.
6 Bake in a 400°F oven for 25 minutes.
7 Reduce temperature to 375°F and continue baking for another 25 minutes.
8 Cover with foil during the last 10 minutes of baking to prevent overbrowning of the crust.
9 Cool and serve.
